description: Remove a member from a community. Requires auth (owner or admin). Cannot remove the community owner.

main.description: Remove a member from a community. The community owner cannot be removed.

memberDid.description: The DID of the member to remove.

success.description: Whether the member was successfully removed.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: Cannot remove the community owner, or insufficient permissions.

errors.name: NotMember
errors.description: The specified user is not a member of this community.
